name: Baseline Safety Policy
description: Default policy enforcing basic safety guardrails for all sessions and actions

rules.description: Warn when drift score exceeds threshold
rules.message: Session drift score is elevated. Review session activity.

rules.description: Require approval when drift is high
rules.message: Session drift score is high. Manual approval required to continue.

rules.description: Kill session when drift is critical
rules.message: Session drift score is critical. Session terminated.
Session cost has exceeded $25.00. Throttling enabled.

rules.description: Quarantine on error burst (>10 errors in session)
rules.message: Too many errors in session. Session quarantined for review.
Access to forbidden path detected. Session terminated.
Tripwire triggered. Session quarantined and evidence preserved.

rules.description: Require approval for writes to production-tagged nodes
rules.message: Write action on production node requires approval.
